EmailTemplate.description: Notify owner when account palan is updated
EmailTemplate.name: Update Account Plan
EmailTemplate.subject: {!Account_Plan__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello {!Account.OwnerFullName},
ACCOUNT PLAN UPDATE
The Account Plan of {!Account_Plan__c.Company__c} has been updated.
To have further details of the Account Plan History, please click here {!Account_Plan__c.Link}
This is an automated email, please do no reply to this email.
